Catalog/Cardiovascular/Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Mitral
❤️ CardiovascularREF: DDL23M-DDL31M✓ Brochure Verified

Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Mitral

Dafodil · Heart Valves

The Dafodil Neo is a tri-leaflet stented bioprosthesis featuring a triple-composite design with bovine pericardium tissue and a triad-frame design utilizing an elgiloy alloy wireform. It incorporates the proprietary Anti Ca+ anti-calcification treatment to ensure long-term durability and hemodynamics support.

MaterialBovine pericardium tissue
WhatsApp Quote
Full Technical Matrix
Full Technical Matrix

Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Mitral

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Storage Temperature
10°C to 25°C (50-77°F)
Storage Solution
0.625% Glutaraldehyde
Rinse Procedure
1 min rinse each in first 3 bowls of normal saline; leave in 4th bowl with normal saline until implantation
MRI Safety Information
MR conditional at 1.5 and 3.0 Tesla
Aortic Valve Size 17mm (DDLN 17A)
Tissue Annulus: 17mm, Int. Stent Post: 16mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 23mm, Total Profile Height: 14mm
Aortic Valve Size 19mm (DDLN 19A)
Tissue Annulus: 19mm, Int. Stent Post: 18mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 25mm, Total Profile Height: 14mm
Aortic Valve Size 21mm (DDLN 21A)
Tissue Annulus: 21mm, Int. Stent Post: 20mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 27mm, Total Profile Height: 15mm
Aortic Valve Size 23mm (DDLN 23A)
Tissue Annulus: 23mm, Int. Stent Post: 22mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 29mm, Total Profile Height: 16mm
Aortic Valve Size 25mm (DDLN 25A)
Tissue Annulus: 25mm, Int. Stent Post: 24mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 31mm, Total Profile Height: 17mm
Aortic Valve Size 27mm (DDLN 27A)
Tissue Annulus: 27mm, Int. Stent Post: 26mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 33mm, Total Profile Height: 18mm
Aortic Valve Size 29mm (DDLN 29A)
Tissue Annulus: 29mm, Int. Stent Post: 28mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 35mm, Total Profile Height: 18mm
Mitral Valve Size 23mm (DDLN 23M)
Stent Dia: 23mm, Int. Stent Post: 26.5mm, Ext. Stent Post: 27mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 33mm, Ventricular Protrusion: 9mm, Total Profile Height: 15mm
Mitral Valve Size 25mm (DDLN 25M)
Stent Dia: 25mm, Int. Stent Post: 28.5mm, Ext. Stent Post: 29mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 36mm, Ventricular Protrusion: 10mm, Total Profile Height: 16mm
Mitral Valve Size 27mm (DDLN 27M)
Stent Dia: 27mm, Int. Stent Post: 30.5mm, Ext. Stent Post: 31mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 38mm, Ventricular Protrusion: 11mm, Total Profile Height: 17mm
Mitral Valve Size 29mm (DDLN 29M)
Stent Dia: 29mm, Int. Stent Post: 33mm, Ext. Stent Post: 33.5mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 41mm, Ventricular Protrusion: 12mm, Total Profile Height: 18mm
Mitral Valve Size 31mm (DDLN 31M)
Stent Dia: 31mm, Int. Stent Post: 35mm, Ext. Stent Post: 35.5mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 43mm, Ventricular Protrusion: 12mm, Total Profile Height: 18mm
Mitral Valve Size 33mm (DDLN 33M)
Stent Dia: 33mm, Int. Stent Post: 37mm, Ext. Stent Post: 37.5mm, Ext. Sewing Ring: 45mm, Ventricular Protrusion: 12mm, Total Profile Height: 19mm

Primary Material

Bovine pericardium tissue

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Tri-leaflet stented bioprosthesis designed for mitral valve replacement with black sutures to reduce commissure profile for easier implantation. Features bovine pericardium tissue with proprietary anti-calcification treatment and commissural markers for optimal suture placement.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Mitral, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Mitral is constructed using Bovine pericardium tissue, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
